name: recoil_state_confirm_quit_queue_enter
description: RecoilStateConfirmQuit::QueueEnter queues g_RecoilState_ConfirmQuit on the global Recoil app with replaceTop false.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja disassembly/decompilation for 0x4159b0 validates push 0, push g_RecoilState_ConfirmQuit, ecx = g_RecoilApp, call RecoilApp::QueuePushState, and return.
The native smoke verifies QueueEnter enqueues one push-state item for g_RecoilState_ConfirmQuit with param 0, enters the state once, and does not exit the previous state.
